one_line: Teenage Bengali revolutionary who faced the gallows after the 1908 Muzaffarpur bombing case.

appearance.age_look: Looks about 17–18, slim and wiry with a light, athletic build and slightly bony shoulders.
appearance.face: Oval face with a softly pointed chin, medium-brown complexion, straight nose, large intense dark eyes with a gentle determined gaze, thin brows, and a default expression that is calm but quietly resolute, often with the faintest hint of a half-smile at the corners of his mouth.
appearance.hair: Thick, slightly wavy black hair kept short and neat, parted slightly off-centre to his right, with a few loose strands falling towards his forehead; no headwear so that his youthful face is always visible.
appearance.costume: Simple early-20th-century Bengali youth attire: an off-white handspun khadi kurta reaching to mid-thigh with a straight band collar and long sleeves, slightly loose but not baggy; a plain cream dhoti (unstitched cloth) tied in the Bengali style, pleated in front and wrapped to mid-calf, edged with a very thin faded maroon border; a lightweight, slightly worn, light-brown cotton gamchha (thin towel/scarf) casually draped over his left shoulder; bare feet with slim ankles to reflect his modest background; no ostentatious jewellery, just a small, plain black-thread bracelet on his right wrist as a quiet nod to local custom.
appearance.signature: A small, weathered brown leather satchel worn diagonally across his chest, hanging at his left hip, with a visible brass buckle and a partially protruding wrapped paper packet representing concealed revolutionary materials.

ref_desc: Khudiram Bose is a slim 17-year-old Bengali youth with short slightly wavy black hair, medium-brown skin, large determined dark eyes, wearing an off-white khadi kurta, cream Bengali-style dhoti with a thin maroon border, light-brown gamchha over his left shoulder, bare feet, and a brown leather cross-body satchel with a brass buckle and a wrapped paper packet protruding, in a palette of off-white, cream, light brown, maroon, and black.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Khudiram Bose as a slim 17-year-old Bengali youth with medium-brown skin, a calm determined expression and large dark eyes, his short slightly wavy black hair parted slightly to the right with a few strands falling toward his forehead; show him in an off-white handspun khadi kurta to mid-thigh with a straight band collar and long sleeves, and a cream dhoti tied in the Bengali style to mid-calf with a thin maroon border, a light-brown cotton gamchha draped over his left shoulder, bare feet, and a small weathered brown leather satchel worn diagonally across his chest resting on his left hip, its brass buckle and a protruding wrapped paper packet clearly visible, using a restrained palette of off-white, cream, light brown, maroon, and black, presented from multiple angles to clearly show his face, hair, clothing details, and satchel.
